content: Oracle Simphony/NCR Aloha model orders as having 'suborders' (roughly: per fire-round/course groupings); order-level operations are gated by suborder state (e.g., 'if any suborder has been bumped, the order cannot be unclaimed'), confirming order-level status is a rollup/derived function of item/suborder state rather than an independently-set field -- validates the PRD's derived-order-status design.
